name: Mount Everest Base Camp
description: Trek to the foot of the world's highest peak, standing at 5,364 meters. Experience the breathtaking Himalayas and the unique Sherpa culture.

name: Santorini Caldera
description: Famous for its stunning white-washed buildings with blue domes overlooking the Aegean Sea. Perfect for sunset viewing and romantic getaways.

name: Amazon Rainforest
description: Explore the world's largest tropical rainforest, home to incredible biodiversity. Experience jungle treks, wildlife spotting, and indigenous culture.

name: Serengeti National Park
description: Witness the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth - the Great Migration. Home to the Big Five and endless savannah plains.

name: Tokyo Cityscape
description: A mesmerizing blend of ultra-modern and traditional, from neon-lit skyscrapers to ancient temples. Experience the vibrant energy of Japan's capital.

name: Hallstatt Village
description: A picturesque village nestled between the Hallstätter See and the Dachstein mountains. Known for its charming alpine houses and salt mining history.

name: Waitomo Glowworm Caves
description: Magical underground caves illuminated by thousands of glowworms. Take a boat ride through the darkness watching these natural lights.

name: Grand Canyon
description: A steep-sided canyon carved by the Colorado River, known for its overwhelming size and intricate landscape. Hike, raft, or take a helicopter tour.

name: Plitvice Lakes National Park
description: A forest reserve in central Croatia known for a chain of 16 terraced lakes joined by waterfalls. Walk along wooden footbridges across the crystal-clear water.

name: Maldives Beaches
description: Paradise on Earth with crystal-clear turquoise waters, white sandy beaches, and overwater bungalows. Perfect for snorkeling and relaxation.

name: Swiss Alps
description: Experience the majestic Swiss Alps with world-class skiing, hiking trails, and charming mountain villages like Zermatt and Interlaken.

name: Bora Bora Lagoon
description: Known for its stunning turquoise lagoon protected by a coral reef and luxurious overwater bungalows. A true South Pacific paradise.

name: Black Forest
description: A dense, magical forest in southwestern Germany known for fairy tales, cuckoo clocks, and scenic hiking trails through pine trees and meadows.

name: Mongolian Steppe
description: Vast, untouched grasslands where nomadic herders still live in traditional gers. Experience the endless horizon and star-filled night skies.

name: New York City
description: The city that never sleeps, home to Times Square, Central Park, Broadway, and iconic skyscrapers like the Empire State Building.

name: Cinque Terre
description: Five colorful fishing villages perched on the rugged Italian Riviera coastline. Connected by scenic hiking trails and a railway.

name: Son Doong Cave
description: The world's largest cave passage, located deep in the Vietnamese jungle. Features its own river, jungle, and climate inside.

name: Antelope Canyon
description: A stunning slot canyon in the American Southwest, known for its wave-like structure and light beams that shine down from openings above.

name: Fjord Norway
description: Dramatic fjords carved by glaciers, with towering cliffs, cascading waterfalls, and serene blue waters. A UNESCO World Heritage site.

name: Maya Bay
description: A stunning beach surrounded by limestone cliffs, made famous by the movie 'The Beach'. Crystal clear waters and white sand.

name: Redwood National Park
description: Home to the tallest trees on Earth, ancient coastal redwoods that soar over 350 feet. Hike among these gentle giants.

name: Sossusvlei Dunes
description: Towering red sand dunes in the Namib Desert, some of the highest in the world. Surreal landscape of dead trees on clay pans.

name: Prague Old Town
description: A fairytale city of Gothic cathedrals, medieval squares, and the famous Astronomical Clock. Rich in history and beer culture.

name: Zhangjiajie Mountains
description: The inspiration for the floating Hallelujah Mountains in Avatar. Towering sandstone pillars covered in lush greenery.

name: Colca Canyon
description: One of the world's deepest canyons, twice as deep as the Grand Canyon. Home to majestic Andean condors and terracing.
